description: Generates age-appropriate hints, encouragement, and tutorial narration for preschoolers based on current game state (duck positions, lives remaining, gondola location). Keeps tone cheerful and simple.

example_response.message: The cheerful hint, encouragement, or tutorial text for the child
example_response.emotion: The emotional tone: happy, excited, gentle, celebratory, encouraging
example_response.action_suggestion: A simple suggested action for the player like steer left, go to beach, collect duck
